cover_letter:
Hi Team,

I saw the Full Stack Developer role at Uniplaces and had to apply. I've been shipping production apps with Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js, and the ownership-driven culture you described is exactly where I thrive.

What really sets me apart is I don't just use AI tools — I build with them. I created a RAG-powered Telegram assistant with LangChain and Pinecone that lets non-technical staff manage records through natural language. I also built an AI drug interaction detector for a medical CRM. So that "AI-Driven Approach" you mentioned is something I actually practice every day.

On the full-stack side, I own everything from architecture decisions to deployment. I built a tourism booking platform with a payment gateway, set up CI/CD with GitHub Actions, and containerized apps with Docker. I care about shipping real value, not just code that compiles.

I know you're looking for 2+ years and I'm at about 8 months of pro experience. But I went from pharmacy grad to shipping production apps in under a year. If you're willing to bet on potential, I'll prove it was the right call.
email_subject: Application: Full Stack Developer at Uniplaces
email_body:
Hi there,

I'm applying for the Full Stack Developer role at Uniplaces and have attached my resume for your review.

I've been building production apps with Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js, and I bring hands-on experience with AI-driven development — including RAG systems and LLM integrations that align with your AI-Driven Approach requirement. I'm used to owning projects from conception through delivery, having built platforms end-to-end with payment integrations, automated workflows, and CI/CD pipelines.

You can see my work at https://kenny-gamma.vercel.app/ and my code at github.com/KennyCandra.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,
Ahmed Abdelrahman
